flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Seminole State College are 7% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($35.4k vs $38.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 41% at Seminole State College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.1k vs 1.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Seminole State College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (27.2% → 20.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Seminole State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
